Artifact_Integrity.h5: No explicit hash or integrity check after write.
Artifact_Integrity.npz: No explicit hash or integrity check after write.
Artifact_Integrity.json: No explicit hash or integrity check after write.
Artifact_Integrity.gif: No explicit hash or integrity check after write.

Logging.worker_unified.py: logs to stdout and file via logger_config.py

Resource_Usage.worker_unified.py: NVIDIA GPU for large runs, 32GB+ RAM recommended

Security.sqlite: No explicit file or DB access controls; SQLite is file-based and open to the process user.

Test_Coverage.other: No explicit tests for orchestrator, DB, or GIF pipeline.

sequence: Simulation Data Output (.h5 written by worker_unified.py)

Concurrency_Risk_Assessment.SQLite: aste_hunter.py uses context managers for DB access, but does not set an explicit timeout on sqlite3.connect. Risk: database is locked if concurrent writes/reads.
Concurrency_Risk_Assessment.Watchdog/File I/O: gif_pipeline_manager.py writes GIF output directly to new_best.gif, not atomically. Risk: FastAPI may read incomplete file.
Concurrency_Risk_Assessment.Subprocess/Blocking: Orchestrator launches worker_unified.py and gif_pipeline_manager.py synchronously. If subprocess.run blocks or hangs, main loop is blocked.

JAX_Boundary_Audit.Crossover_Leaks: psi_simulation uses print() and standard Python for/if loops outside @jax.jit, but no print/if/for inside @jax.jit detected. No direct jax.debug.print or jax.lax.cond usage found.

Data_Provenance_Chain.metrics_npz: extract_topology_metrics.py writes topology_metrics_<hash>.npz (not shown in full, but called from orchestrator)
Data_Provenance_Chain.provenance_json: provenance_reports/provenance_<hash>.json written by validation pipeline (not shown in full)

Exception_Boundaries.Worker_Numerical_Explosion: worker_unified.py: psi_simulation raises RuntimeError on NaN, main() catches and logs with sys.exit(10)
Exception_Boundaries.DB_Insertion: aste_hunter.py: process_generation_results wraps DB ops in try/except, logs and marks failed runs
Exception_Boundaries.GIF_Rendering: gif_pipeline_manager.py: process_new_high_score wraps subprocess.run in try/except, logs errors
Exception_Boundaries.Orchestrator: adaptive_hunt_orchestrator.py: subprocess.run for extract_topology_metrics.py is not wrapped in try/except; main loop may halt on failure.
